---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like to add or improve
Describe the feature or change.

## Why would this help
Explain the problem it solves or why it would be useful.

## Example workflow
Describe how you imagine using it.

## Anything else
Optional links, screenshots, or examples from other tools.
